description: Business letter from (or possibly to) Yehuda Ibn Sughmār. In Judaeo-Arabic. Headed "tadhkira muwajjaha(?) = "memorandum sent(?)." The sender expresses his longing for the addressee, who was his support ("al-ʿudda wa-l-ʿumda") when they were together. Mentions goods such as lac and honey. Reused in the bottom margin and on verso for an account in Judaeo-Arabic in a different hand, listing expenses (nafaqa).
description_he: מכתב עסקי מ(או אל) יהודה אבן סוגמאר, ביהודית-ערבית. השולח מביע את געגועיו לנמען. מוזכרים לאק ודבש. שימוש חוזר בשוליים ובגב לחשבון הוצאות ביהודית-ערבית.
